_comment: Conforming reference manifest for Lithos's single full-lifecycle governance model, with every optional field populated and the knowledge spine fully elaborated. Lithos defines exactly one governance model; this fixture shows it in full detail, while valid-concise-adoption.json shows the same model kept terse. A manifest declares conformance; it does not authorize anything.

conformance_claim.statement: conforms to Lithos 1.x under the full-lifecycle governance model

controller.assigned_to: a contributing engineer or orchestrating agent under maintainer instruction

architect.assigned_to: the assigned maintainer for the change

implementation_agent.assigned_to: a human contributor or an AI agent

reviewer.assigned_to: a maintainer not involved in the implementation

verifier.assigned_to: the continuous integration system and an assigned maintainer

knowledge_governance.evidence_retention: development logs, verification results, and run manifests retained under docs/dev_log/ for the project's stated audit horizon
knowledge_governance.stale_knowledge_handling: use-driven validation; archived, superseded, and deprecated records are immutable
